creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for the report Chris.

Looking at portscouts maintainer list and searching for this accounts email in freshports MAINTAINER search shows no results.

Are you still receiving email notifications from portscout, and if so can you provide examples so we can narrow it down.

Alternatively if you are no longer receiving notifications, please close this issue with Resolution: Overcome By Events, or 'FIXED' if a previous/earlier reset of MAINTAINER lines resulted in no longer receiving notifications as is normally the case.
